languages.text: "Не слишком ли у тебя органическое лицо? У большинства техножрецов имплантов побольше".
"Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."
languages.original_text: "Не слишком ли у тебя органическое лицо? У большинства техножрецов имплантов побольше".

traits.locale_text: "Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."
"Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."
"Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."

languages.text: «¿No es su rostro demasiado orgánico? La mayoría de los tecnosacerdotes tienen más implantes».
languages.original_text: "Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."

traits.locale_text: «¿No es su rostro demasiado orgánico? La mayoría de los tecnosacerdotes tienen más implantes».

languages.text: “你的脸是不是太‘有机’了一点？大多数技术神甫身上的植入物可要多得多。”
languages.original_text: "Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."

traits.locale_text: “你的脸是不是太‘有机’了一点？大多数技术神甫身上的植入物可要多得多。”

languages.text: « Vos traits ne seraient-ils pas trop organiques ? La plupart des technoprêtres ont plus d'implants. »
languages.original_text: "Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."

traits.locale_text: « Vos traits ne seraient-ils pas trop organiques ? La plupart des technoprêtres ont plus d'implants. »

languages.text: "Ist Euer Gesicht nicht etwas zu organisch?" Die meisten Techpriester haben mehr Implantate."
languages.original_text: "Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."

traits.locale_text: "Ist Euer Gesicht nicht etwas zu organisch?" Die meisten Techpriester haben mehr Implantate."

languages.text: "Yüzün sence de fazla organik değil mi? Çoğu Tekno Rahip'in daha fazla implantı vardır."
languages.original_text: "Isn't your face rather too organic? Most Tech-Priests have more implants."

traits.locale_text: "Yüzün sence de fazla organik değil mi? Çoğu Tekno Rahip'in daha fazla implantı vardır."
